title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS trusted by brands like The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. The role requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, with proven experience scaling RevOps beyond $30M+ ARR. Candidates need deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, and experience working with globally distributed teams including the Tel Aviv HQ. A leader-doer mindset with a builder's mentality is essential.
score_reason: Omri is a near-perfect match with 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps expertise, strong Salesforce chops, and proven ability to scale revenue operations at high-growth companies. The Tel Aviv/hybrid structure and Finout's cloud-native, high-growth profile align perfectly with his background and location preferences.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of RevOps opening and your background immediately stood out—your 15+ years scaling GTM operations in B2B SaaS, combined with deep Salesforce expertise and CAC/LTV optimization, is exactly what Finout needs as they scale beyond their current ARR. Having built RevOps functions for hypergrowth companies, you'd be stepping into a role where you can directly impact the revenue motion of a platform trusted by tier-1 brands like Wiz and Lyft—and the Tel Aviv HQ + global team structure aligns with your location flexibility.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a revenue intelligence platform, is hiring a RevOps Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations. The role requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or GTM planning, with a deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, sales territories, and segmentation. Responsibilities include redesigning territory models for global scalability, partnering with Sales leadership and Finance on territory composition, and maintaining mapping in tools like Fullcast and Salesforce. Strong analytical skills in Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Retool) plus CRM proficiency are needed.
score_reason: Exceptional match. Omri's 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps expertise, Salesforce proficiency, and GTM/pipeline forecasting background directly align with territory strategy, sales operations, and analytics demands. The role sits squarely in his target range (RevOps Manager/Head of Revenue Operations) at a market-leading revenue intelligence platform.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I've spent 15+ years building scalable revenue operations and GTM infrastructure in B2B SaaS—from territory design and sales segmentation to forecasting and Salesforce optimization. Gong's focus on territory strategy and global scalability resonates deeply with my background, and I'm particularly drawn to how your revenue intelligence platform shapes go-to-market decisions. I'd love to explore how I can help unlock new growth through smarter territory composition and operations.

title: Revenue Operations (RevOps) Manager
description: Passage Health seeks its first dedicated RevOps leader to serve as a core member of GTM leadership and architect of data, insights, and operational excellence across Sales and Marketing. The role requires 3+ years in RevOps, BizOps in early-stage startups, and/or consulting—ideally in SaaS or health tech. You'll work hand-in-hand with the CEO and GTM leadership to define metrics, shape strategic decisions, and build the analytical and operational backbone of the growth engine. A strong analytical and systems mindset plus experience building GTM systems is required.
score_reason: Omri is a perfect match as a senior RevOps executive with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience seeking exactly this type of foundational RevOps leadership role. His expertise in pipeline forecasting, metrics definition, and GTM systems directly aligns with Passage Health's need for their first dedicated RevOps architect.
ai_opener: I noticed Passage Health is building out its first dedicated RevOps function—this is exactly the type of greenfield GTM infrastructure challenge I've spent 15+ years solving in B2B SaaS. With deep experience architecting data pipelines, forecasting models, and sales-marketing alignment systems from the ground up, I'm confident I can rapidly build the analytical backbone your CEO and GTM team needs to scale predictably.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo is an AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, high-quality consumer/B2B research, used by global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange. As GTM Engineer, you'll code, ship, and iterate on internal tools and automations that make the GTM team effective. You'll replace manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows—building lead scoring models that learn, attribution pipelines, onboarding flows that activate customers faster, and AI agents that eliminate hours of manual work weekly. Ideal for someone comfortable with rapid iteration during hypergrowth.
score_reason: Strong alignment on GTM Engineer title, AI-native workflows, and RevOps automation (lead scoring, attribution, onboarding), but the role's heavy coding/engineering focus and consumer research platform (vs. B2B SaaS vertical) create friction for a RevOps executive whose strength is business systems, not software development.
ai_opener: Conveo's vision of AI-powered GTM workflows resonates—I've spent 15+ years building exactly those kinds of automations (lead scoring, attribution, activation pipelines) in B2B SaaS. The difference is I've done it from the RevOps side, not the engineering side. If you need someone who can architect what these systems should do and own the GTM outcomes they drive, rather than write the code itself, I'd be worth a conversation.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Pylon seeks a GTM Engineer to test, implement, and optimize an AI outbound solution from setup through performance tuning. Responsibilities include building automated outbound sequences with high deliverability, owning email marketing infrastructure (domain health, warming, deliverability monitoring), creating data pipelines between marketing tools, CRM, and sales tooling for attribution, and collaborating with RevOps on lead scoring and routing. Requires 3+ years in marketing operations or GTM/growth engineering at B2B SaaS companies, hands-on experience with automated outbound, and strong technical skills with APIs and webhooks.
score_reason: Strong alignment with GTM Engineer role leveraging 15+ years B2B SaaS expertise, RevOps collaboration, and technical infrastructure skills. AI-native outbound optimization matches Omri's modern GTM tooling background, though role skews slightly more technical/IC than typical senior executive trajectory.
ai_opener: Omri here—noticed Pylon is building an AI outbound solution and need someone to own the full stack from domain health to attribution pipelines. With 15+ years scaling B2B RevOps and GTM at SaaS companies, I've built these exact infrastructure layers (Salesforce/HubSpot integrations, lead scoring models, API-driven data pipelines). This looks like a chance to architect something with real compounding returns.

title: GTM Engineer

score_reason: Excellent alignment with Omri's RevOps expertise, enterprise B2B SaaS background, and AI-native GTM focus. The foundational GTM Engineer role matches his target profile perfectly, though the outbound/list-building emphasis is slightly narrower than his full scope.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years architecting revenue systems for B2B SaaS, and your GTM Engineer role caught my attention because you're solving exactly what I've built: stitching BDR, marketing, and sales ops into a unified ICP machine. Your focus on low-volume, high-quality enterprise outbound with genuine AI fluency aligns with how I think about modern go-to-market, and I'd love to explore how I could own this foundational layer at Gradient Labs.
